title: TriggerAckParams
description:
Parameters sent from host to plugin in the `trigger/ack` notification.

The host emits this after it has accepted an event for processing. Plugins
use it to persist a cursor or trim a server-side queue.

status.description: Optional status the host wants to report. See [`TriggerAckStatus`].

TriggerAckStatus.description: Trigger ack status. Wire representation is a snake_case string; unknown values round-trip via Other.
